phoneticUs: 藞bju藧t蓹藢n蓴藧l; 藞bju藧t蓹藢no蕣l
examples: "The most important about this discovery is TU-103's ability to produce butanol directly from cellulose," said Mullin.
Like ethanol, butanol is an alcohol.
The first step on the road has been butanol.
Spread over a 3-square-mile industrial campus, along roads with names like Ammonia St. and Butanol St.
The aim is to turn out an annual 2 billion litres of butanol by 2014.
